title: Verify existing clamp utility implementation
description: The clamp utility already exists at src/utils/clamp.ts with comprehensive tests in src/utils/clamp.test.ts. The task requested creation in math-helpers.ts but the functionality is already implemented and tested at the standard utils location.
existing_patterns: src/utils/clamp.ts - single-function utility module with validation, following standard utils pattern
src/utils/clamp.test.ts - co-located test file using vitest with describe/it structure
